{{Quote|Got a team of bulk-loader droids and a sweet arrangement with the Highport Stevedore Guild. When there's a work overflow, my team goes in—and your bargains come out!|Marn Hierogryph|<ref name="kotor1" />}}
The '''Highport Stevedore Guild''' was an organization of dock workers in the<ref name="kotor1" /> major [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] known as [[Highport]] in the [[Upper City]]<ref name="cswe" /> of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. Active during the era of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], the Guild had clandestine business ties with local hood [[Marn Hierogryph]]. The arrangement between the Guild and Hierogryph meant that when there was a work overflow on the docks, Hierogryph's team of [[LB-series bulk-loading droid|bulk-loader droids]] would be called in to do Hierogryph's bidding—in one case, the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] took a large quantity of [[Lum/Legends|lum ale]] from a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] bound for the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to be resold on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], replacing the cargo with a thousand kegs of local sewage.<ref name="kotor1" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Highport Stevedore Guild was mentioned in the [[Knights of the Old Republic 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series. The issue was written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="kotor1" /> on [[January 25]], [[2006]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-857/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-1|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #1}}</ref>
